src: Official repository for the paper "Vision Transformers for End-to-End Vision-Based Quadrotor Obstacle  Avoidance"  by Bhattacharya, et al. (2024) from GRASP, Penn.
ja: 論文「Vision Transformers for End-to-End Vision-Based Quadrotor Obstacle Avoidance」(Bhattacharya et al., 2024、ペンシルベニア大学GRASP)の公式リポジトリ。
